calendar.matters:
Motion To Tax Or Strike Costs
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF JOEL HODGELL'S Motion To Tax Or Strike Costs: DENIED as to filing fees; DENIED as to travel expenses; GRANTED as to research fees in the amount of $162.82. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Mar-03-2004 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Requiring Pltf To File An Undertaking Pursuant To Ccp 1030 And For An Order Staying Lawsuit
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT TOPICA, INC'S Motion For An Order Requiring Plaintiff To File An Undertaking Pursuant To Ccp 1030 And For An Order Staying Lawsuit: OFF CALENDAR; matter dismissed on 02/13/04. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION Notice For Requiring Plaintiff'S Undertaking
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Roger M. Townsend, Esq., Newman & Newman LLP (206) 274-2800 for Defendant and Moving Party Mindshare Design, Inc.
Timothy J. Walton, Esq., Pierce & Shearer LLP (650) 843-1900 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Hodgell
RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Pursuant to 1030 CCP,
DEFENDANT MINDSHARE DESIGN, INC.'S Motion Requiring Plaintiff's Undertaking: GRANTED in the amount of $25,000.00; the Request for Stay is GRANTED pending the posting of the undertaking. Counsel to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION Notice For Requiring Plaintiff'S Undertaking
